title: Update cross totem
description: resource pack that changes the usual totem to a cross
body:
Transform your Minecraft experience with the cross totem Resource Pack! Say farewell to traditional totems and embrace a new symbol of resilience Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or battling formidable foes, let the cross totem Resource Pack be your steadfast companion in the world of Minecraft.

### There is a version with sound (will only be understandable to Russian speakers), there is a version without sound, see below in the version section⇩⇩⇩
